message:
fix(extensions): CancelGuard RAII for hostcall cancellation + input height viewport refresh

src/extension_dispatcher.rs:
- Add a CancelGuard struct that implements Drop to set the cancel
  AtomicBool to true when the extension dispatch future is dropped
  (e.g., on timeout or task cancellation). Without this, if the
  tokio task is cancelled between hostcall dispatch and completion,
  the cancel flag would never be set, leaving the JS runtime polling
  indefinitely for a response that will never arrive.

src/interactive.rs:
- Track input textarea height before and after key handling in the
  Idle state. When the height changes (e.g., user types a long message
  that wraps to a new line, or deletes enough to shrink), call
  refresh_conversation_viewport() to recalculate the conversation
  scroll area. Prevents the conversation from visually overlapping
  the input area or leaving a gap when the input grows/shrinks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
